label: Product Image
description: Commercial product visual for ecommerce, catalog, and campaign usage.

prompt.promptTemplate: Create a polished product marketing image for {{productName}} by {{brandName}}.

fragments.subject: {{productName}}, a {{productCategory}} that communicates {{keyBenefit}}
fragments.style: clean commercial visual, ecommerce-safe, industrial production quality, {{brandTone}}
fragments.composition: single clear focal product, balanced layout, safe area for copy, conversion-oriented composition
fragments.lighting: soft studio lighting with crisp edges
fragments.color: {{accentColor}} accents on a neutral premium palette
negative: extra objects not supporting the product

notes: Use for operational marketing output rather than expressive art.
